result.stdout:
usage:
  Executes the sub-commands
    forge [command] [command-options]

commands:
    init         Inits a new template
    projects     List the projects
                 Manage the projects
    run          Runs the template injector.
    templates    List the templates
                 Manage the templates
    update       Updates the _globals folder of a template.
    variables    List the variables
                 Manage the variables

For more information about the commands please run
    forge [command] --help

commands.payload:
usage:
  Executes the sub-commands
    forge [command] [command-options]

commands:
    init         Inits a new template
    projects     List the projects
                 Manage the projects
    run          Runs the template injector.
    templates    List the templates
                 Manage the templates
    update       Updates the _globals folder of a template.
    variables    List the variables
                 Manage the variables

For more information about the commands please run
    forge [command] --help

result.stdout:
usage:
  Inits a new template
    forge init

result.stdout:
usage:
  List the projects
    forge projects

  Manage the projects
    forge projects [command]

commands:

    remove    Removes a project

For more information about the commands please run
    forge projects [command] --help

result.stdout:
usage:
  List the templates
    forge templates

  Manage the templates
    forge templates [command]

commands:

    forge templates [command] --help

commands.payload:
usage:
  Updates the _globals folder of a template.
    forge update

result.stdout:
usage:
  List the variables
    forge variables [variables-options]

  Manage the variables
    forge variables [variables-options] [command]

commands:
    remove    Removes a variable
    set       Set up a variable.

variables-options:
    -t        List only the specified template.
    -f        List only the specified folder
    -v        List only the specified variable

For more information about the commands please run
    forge variables [command] --help

commands.payload:
usage:
  List the variables
    forge variables [variables-options]

  Manage the variables
    forge variables [variables-options] [command]

commands:
    remove    Removes a variable
    set       Set up a variable.

variables-options:
    -t        List only the specified template.
    -f        List only the specified folder
    -v        List only the specified variable

For more information about the commands please run
    forge variables [command] --help
